/usr/bin/gcc -Wall -g -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -DPCL_PLATFORM_TI_AM625=1 -DPCL_PRODUCT_H200_100P=1 -DACL_MAX_DEVICES=64 -DH200_AM625=1 CMakeFiles/supervisor.dir/app_supervisor_exe_src.c.o -o supervisor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm_product/build/hal:/home/wanguo/EMS/products/ccm_product/build/osal app_supervisor/libapp_supervisor.a h200_am625/libh200_am625.a acl/libacl.a pdl/libpdl.a pcl/libpcl.a hal/libhal.so libccm/liblibccm.a osal/libosal.so -lpthread -lrt -lm
